hero.description: Monitor, measure and report environmental performance for Green Office certification. Explore resource dashboards, assessment categories, and evidence library.

mission.heading: Green Office 2026 Platform
mission.description1: A centralized platform for tracking, measuring, and reporting environmental performance aligned with Green Office certification criteria. Features six-resource dashboards, assessment category framework, and evidence management system.
mission.description2: Support the full certification lifecycle — from policy planning and performance tracking to evidence collection and audit readiness.

executive.heading: Resource Command Center
executive.description: Build-time dashboard across six operational resource metrics with monthly trends and year-over-year baseline comparison.
executive.label: Dashboard

assessment.heading: Assessment Categories
assessment.description: Seven Green Office certification categories covering all operational environmental dimensions.

evidence.heading: Evidence Library
evidence.description: Evidence records linked to Green Office categories and indicators, ready for certification audit.
evidence.capability_1: Evidence mapped to configured Green Office categories and indicators
evidence.capability_2: Ready for source document integration and audit verification
evidence.capability_3: Structure aligned with Green Office certification requirements

activities.heading: The Environmental Journey
activities.description: Preview slots for activities, campaigns, awareness, and training milestones.
activities.activity_1_excerpt: This space is reserved for approved local activity evidence once real records are added to the repository.
activities.activity_2_excerpt: Add verified campaign summaries, dates, and images before this card is promoted as real content.
activities.activity_3_excerpt: This placeholder avoids inventing dates, attendance, or outcomes until approved documents exist locally.

improvement.label: Sustainability Pathway
improvement.heading: Continuous Improvement
improvement.description: A structured overview of the Green Office certification journey — from policy planning through to audit readiness and continuous improvement.
improvement.stage_1_description: Strategic commitments and organizational structure for sustainability leadership.
improvement.stage_2_description: Behavioral change through campaigns, workshops, and institutional engagement.
improvement.stage_3_description: Conservation across electricity, water, fuel, and paper consumption vectors.
improvement.stage_4_description: Segregation, diversion, and responsible disposal across campus operations.
improvement.stage_5_description: Indoor air quality, ergonomics, and emergency readiness standards.
improvement.stage_6_description: Supplier evaluation and environmentally preferred purchasing policies.
improvement.stage_7_description: Management review, target refinement, and certification readiness cycles.

showcase.heading: Environmental Intelligence Center
showcase.subtitle: Green Office 2026 Platform
showcase.body: The organization's environmental intelligence hub supporting end-to-end Green Office operations — from executive KPI monitoring and resource analytics to evidence management and continuous improvement.

cta.label: Ready to explore
cta.heading: Green Office Command Center
cta.description: Start with executive monitoring, category review, or evidence discovery across the platform.

footer.title: Green Office 2026
footer.description: Environmental intelligence platform for Green Office certification. Monitor, measure, and report environmental performance across all certification categories.

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboardPage.subtitle: Multi-year monitoring: 2568 baseline · 2569 current operational data.
dashboardPage.yoy_caption: 2568 = Baseline (complete) · 2569 = Current operational year (data entry in progress)
dashboardPage.partial_year_body: 2569 (current year) data entry is still in progress across all metrics. The YoY percentages shown above reflect a partial-year comparison and may not be representative of full annual trends. Interpret with caution until complete 12-month data is available.
dashboardPage.completeness_note: All metrics have complete 2568 baseline (12/12 months). Grid below shows current-year data only.
dashboardPage.source_same_files: Same source files as baseline, updated monthly
dashboardPage.reference_note: Dashboard structure and KPI terminology adapted from the Green Office Platform, Maejo University

documentsPage.title: Document Center
documentsPage.description: Browse and download certification evidence documents organized by Green Office category.
documentsPage.empty_title: No evidence files indexed for this category yet.
documentsPage.empty_body: Documents will appear here once uploaded.
